message:
refactor(executor): apply DRY principles with free()/len() methods and inline else

Key improvements:
- Add free() and len() methods to Result.ColumnData and CachedColumn unions
- Replace 5 duplicate cleanup switches with single free() method calls
- Use inline else pattern for filterColumnByIndices, reorderColumn, sliceColumn
- Reduces executor.zig from 5,132 to 4,866 lines (-266 lines, -5%)

The inline else pattern collapses 12-case switches into 2 cases (string + generic),
eliminating repetitive boilerplate while preserving type safety. String handling
remains separate due to allocation requirements (dupe vs copy).
